title: Risk-off tape — tech led lower, VIX pops
tag: Broad red close with QQQ the clear laggard and volatility rising — a day to reduce speed and protect process.

spy.read: Down day after flirting with highs — index gave back ground

qqq.read: Led lower — mega-cap tech weakness set the tone

dia.read: Held up best of the majors — still red, but less damage

iwm.read: Small caps relatively resilient — mild defensive rotation vs tech

sentiment.label: BEARISH
sentiment.qualifier: broad decline with tech leading lower and volatility rising

weather.volatility: VIX 18.77, up 12.19% on the day — fear premium back in the tape
weather.tone: Protect-first — down tape with rising vol; wait for cleaner alignment

cluster: Leadership lane: DIA and IWM held up; QQQ lagged — defense vs tech today
Volatility regime: VIX jumped to 18.77 (+12.19%) — treat signals as lower-confidence until vol cools
Breadth read: all four major ETFs closed red — not a one-sector hiccup
Rotation note: mild rotation away from mega-cap tech toward value/smaller names (relative basis)
Earnings tape context: Travelers (TRV), Truist (TFC), Fifth Third (FITB), Regions (RF) reported today — financial prints in the mix
Behavior rule: no chasing downside; keep size small, demand A+ setups, and respect wider stops/vol
account: Mission for today: reduce speed — protect process, keep risk tight, and wait for alignment
Broker status: IB sandbox scoped, not yet connected; Schwab pending
Event risk: earnings season flow continues into next week — headline gaps still on the table
checklist: Execution reality check: cash is safety — no obligation to trade a noisy tape
Core universe glance: SPY/DIA/IWM steady-red; QQQ weak — leadership not supportive
Day-specific catalyst note #1: financial earnings (TRV, TFC, FITB, RF) reported today
Day-specific catalyst note #2: keep an eye on upcoming earnings calendar — avoid holding lottery risk into prints
body_muted: Today is a protect-first day. If there isn't a clean setup, the best trade is patience.
